_description: 追踪当前全量审计周期状态。全量审计事件驱动：上次派生的 fix 全部 merge/reject 落定后才触发下一次全量审计。引擎每轮 step 0 读这个文件决定本轮是审计轮还是瞭望轮。

derived_fixes.note: .env plaintext API keys committed to repo — P0 credential exposure. Add .gitignore + rotate keys. REJECTED 2026-07-02T09:46Z: re-verified .env is NOT in git index (git ls-files empty) and IS matched by .gitignore:6 — finding was based on stale state; no code change needed. User-side key rotation still recommended out-of-band.
Wildcard CORS allow_origins=[*] + zero auth on all endpoints — P0 security. Restrict origins. FIXED: explicit localhost whitelist in api.py.

POST /settings/llm accepts api_key+base_url unauthenticated — SSRF/credential theft vector. FIXED: _AuthMiddleware with PA_API_TOKEN bearer check + localhost fallback. Commit 74fa547 in opt-audit-1782987109. Synced 2026-07-02.

Path traversal in POST /inbox/upload — arbitrary file write. FIXED: Path.name sanitize + is_relative_to guard. Commit 1999ffa stacked on opt-security-1782909081 (already had bearer gate). Awaiting human merge.
verify.py _item_counter global mutable — race condition in concurrent POST /verify. FIXED on main: itertools.count(1) replaces int counter; run_all() resets per-run. Synced 2026-07-02.
asr.py dead code scan_once/run_loop after return statement. Relocated to IngestionPipeline class.

DELETE /chat-log no auth/confirmation — silent PII deletion via wildcard CORS. SUPERSEDED: H-003 bearer-token gate (opt-security-1782909081) now protects all non-public endpoints including /chat-log. No separate fix needed.
storage.connect() runs full DDL every connection — redundant overhead. FIXED: _schema_ready set caches init per db_path; executescript only on first connect. Commit in opt-storage-1782988687.

llm._post_json() no network error handling — opaque exceptions propagate through pipeline. FIXED: LLMRequestError + try/except chain for HTTPError/URLError/OSError/JSONDecodeError in opt-llm-1782989167.

storage ID generation uses non-deterministic hash() — dedup broken across processes. FIXED as PA-L-001 in case-2026-07-01-629 (commit afb90b8): _make_id sha256+uuid4 helper replaces all 5 abs(hash()) sites. Cross-ref: same root cause as audit-2026-07-01-006 PA-L-001.

POST /settings/llm stores api_key plaintext in config._RUNTIME with no expiration. FIXED: _SENSITIVE_TTL map + lazy eviction in get()/overrides(); 4h default for api_key suffix. Commit 14b1d44 in opt-config-1782989845. Awaiting human merge.
web.py spoofs Chrome UA for Bing/Baidu scraping — ToS violation + no rate limit. FIXED: 2s min interval rate limit + honest bot UA prefix in _fetch(). Commit 5ac510d in opt-web-1782977902.

.env parser can't handle # in values or escaped quotes. FIXED: _parse_env_value() supports double/single-quoted values (preserves # and spaces; \" \' \\ escapes) + unquoted inline-comment (' #' starts comment). Commit 763f70e in opt-personal-assistant-1782909325. Synced 2026-07-02.
ingest.scan_inbox() FileNotFoundError if inbox missing. Add mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True).
Recurring reminder ID grows unbounded (-next-next...). FIXED: re.sub strips -next chain → stable base_id; INSERT OR REPLACE updates row in-place. Commit in opt-personal-assistant-1782909325.
add_chat_log bare Exception catch swallows real errors. FIXED: sqlite3.OperationalError + msg-content guard (only ALTER when 'evidence'+'no such column'). Commit 3806668 in opt-storage-1782988687.

_status_note: 2026-07-02T11:35Z: L-005 fixed (case-147/opt-storage-1782988687 commit 3806668). All 16 derived fixes from audit-2026-07-02-008 resolved (13 merged, 1 rejected, 1 superseded, 1 merged-no-case). Cycle complete — next wheel triggers new full-depth audit on unaudited project.
